title: Passionfruit API
description: A core lib for most AceCommander492 and TheDeadlyDevil09s mods. Adds a secret crafting recipe for a passionfruit.
body:
Note: Required by all AceComander492 and TheDeadlyDevil09s mods

Passionfruit API is a robust and versatile mod designed to infuse your projects with a burst of flavor and functionality. With its intuitive design and seamless integration, Passionfruit API offers developers a sweet solution for streamlining data exchange and communication within their applications. Whether you're crafting an immersive gaming experience or revolutionizing business operations, this API mod provides a deliciously simple way to connect, share, and innovate. Say goodbye to bland interfaces and hello to the tantalizing possibilities of Passionfruit API.
